meaning: n.兰开夏(英格兰西北部之州)
examples: Anne is a Lancashire lass from Longton, near Preston.
Lancashire was a producer of coal, Manchester a consumer.
The first trial fracking in the UK took place last month, in Lancashire.
Jason Lewry (3-39) was the pick of the bowlers as Lancashire were 285 all out.
Detectives in Lancashire are still hoping to question a 21-year-old also arrested in connection with the incident.
